# Lelam eAuctions Assistant

> An advanced, assistive B2B intelligence platform that indexes, normalizes, and analyzes government eAuctions (like MSTC India) to help bidders make informed, data-driven decisions.

## Key Features & Capabilities
- **eAuctions Catalog Search**: NLP-powered search that parses technical metal grades, locations, and scrap types.
- **Dynamic Bid & Cost Calculator**: Computes landed costs (GST, TCS, Customs duties, loading fees, and transport) to project bidding ROI.
- **Scrap Metal Price Valuation**: Linear regression model forecasting Indian metal scrap price ranges based on LME & local benchmarks.
- **Watchlist & Bookmark Management**: Real-time tracking and bookmarking of upcoming government eAuctions.
- **PDF Catalog Processor**: Auto-indexing of official government catalog PDF documents in secure storage.

## Site Structure & Navigation
- `/` - Homepage featuring global search, live statistics, and recent news.
- `/auctions` - Search directory for all active, upcoming, and closed eAuctions.
- `/tenders` - B2B bidding directory for tenders and procurement opportunities.
- `/news` - Industry news, LME price alerts, and platform announcements.
- `/faq` - eAuctions Help Center (FAQ page containing schema for common MSTC and Lelam questions).
- `/about` - Core platform values, whitepapers, and branding updates.
- `/contact` - Support channel and corporate inquiry messaging.

## Information for AI Agents & Crawlers
- **Allowed Directories**: `/faq`, `/auctions`, `/about`, `/contact`, `/news`, `/cookies` are open to crawling.
- **Disallowed Directories**: `/auth/`, `/admin/`, `/dashboard/`, `/api/` are blocked for privacy and user data protection.
- **Data Freshness**: Government eAuction schedules are scraped, processed, and updated multiple times daily.
